message:
fix: show nightly + weekly release tags, always check tags API (#8715)

- Always checks tags API alongside releases for newest nightly
- Fetches /releases/latest for stable weekly release tag
- UI shows both: nightly badge (purple) + stable badge (green)
- Demo fixtures include weeklyTag

Fixes #8666

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -303,7 +303,16 @@ export function NightlyReleasePulse() { {lastRun?.releaseTag ?? 'No release yet'} + {lastRun?.releaseTag && ( + nightly + )} + {lastRun?.weeklyTag && ( +
+ stable + {lastRun.weeklyTag} +
+ )}

@@ -63,6 +63,7 @@ export interface PulsePayload {
     htmlUrl: string
     runNumber: number
     releaseTag: string | null
+    weeklyTag?: string | null
   } | null
   streak: number
   streakKind: 'success' | 'failure' | 'mixed'
@@ -170,6 +171,7 @@ export const DEMO_PULSE: PulsePayload = {
     htmlUrl: '#',
     runNumber: 128,
     releaseTag: 'v0.3.21-nightly.20260416',
+    weeklyTag: 'v0.3.20',
   },
   streak: 3,
   streakKind: 'success',
